title: Rose Gold Makeup Brush, 1 Piece - Comfortable, Assorted Design (Blusher, Foundation, Contour, Fan, Eyeshadow, or Powder) Ideal Cosmetic Application Tool for Personal & Professional Use
features: ASSORTED BRUSH TYPES: Each individual acetate box contains one of the following: a blusher brush, foundation brush, contour brush, fan brush, eyeshadow brush, or powder brush. Collect all six for a complete makeup arsenal.

LONG-LASTING PERFORMANCE: Crafted with precision and designed for durability, our brushes are built to last. With proper care, these brushes will remain an essential part of your makeup routine for years to come.
SUPREME COMFORT & HANDLING: Ergonomically constructed, these brushes provide a comfortable grip, ensuring smooth, even coverage with every stroke. Perfect for beginners or makeup enthusiasts.

MULTIPURPOSE USE: These versatile brushes are not just for creating stunning makeup looks. Use them for various application techniques and styles, suitable for beauty enthusiasts and professional makeup artists alike.
EASY TO CLEAN & MAINTAIN: Our brushes are designed for easy maintenance, ensuring long-lasting performance. Simply rinse with lukewarm water and mild soap, reshape the bristles and leave to air dry.
description: Product Description These makeup brushes are a great everyday personal care essential. Safety Warning No warning applicable
